name: ng-dialog
title: Dialog (Angular)
description: Modal overlay anchored at viewport center, built on Spartan-ng brain Dialog. Use for focused decisions or short flows that need to interrupt the user context - confirmations, single-step forms, detail cards. Mirrors React Dialog from @gremorie/rx-overlays.

usage.whenToUse: TBD - document when to use ng-dialog.
usage.whenNotToUse: TBD - document when to reach for something else.
